name: text
description: Running text: paragraphs, leads, captions. Capped at the reading measure so lines never run edge-to-edge (foundation typography law).

align.description: Text alignment. Long-form text stays start-aligned.

a11y.contrast: All tones meet 4.5:1 against their intended surface; subtle is the AA floor.
notes: The measure (65ch) is a readability contract — do not remove the cap on paragraph text.
`caption` is used for eyebrows and metadata, not for primary reading content.

elementor.notes: Compiles to the Elementor Text Editor widget; the measure is applied as a max-width on the container.

mapping.variant: Style → Typography, bound to a Global Font
mapping.tone: Style → Text Color, bound to a Global Color
